scripts.dev:web: cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_GIT_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) pnpm --filter @station-eden/web dev
scripts.dev:web:nocache: cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_GIT_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) pnpm --filter @station-eden/web dev:nocache
scripts.dev:api: cross-env GIT_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) pnpm --filter @station-eden/api start:dev
scripts.clean: pnpm -r run clean && pnpm -w exec rimraf node_modules && pnpm store prune
